judgment_day_note3: Round3: both judges 0 CRITICAL; rename/move criticals confirmed closed + genuinely tested. Remaining = real-but-non-critical hardening (W1 pkg-01 live-resolution, W2 fit-01 import-graph, W3 publish repo-owner guard, W5 std-01 test, W6 finally-flush error-mask, W7 fit-04 mtime) + suggestions. User DECISION: accept now + archive with followups (logged in followups.md). W4 partial-flush: keep + documented in defineFactory JSDoc. judgment-day terminal = ACCEPTED (human override of remaining non-critical warnings).
judgment_day_note2: Round2: Judge A clean; Judge B reproduced 2 CRITICALs the chaining tests structurally miss: rename() returns handle for newName but file lands at dirname(path)/newName; move() returns handle for old (deleted) source. ADR-0004 chaining broken. Tests read a dummy path, never .read() the returned handle. Fixing iter2 + adding chained-write round-trip tests. Judge A SUGGESTIONs (dist/core ships, move silent-overwrite, modify-of-missing) = followups.
judgment_day_note: Blind dual judges found a CONFIRMED CRITICAL the whole pipeline missed: defineFactory runner never flushes Session at run-end; flush only fires inside read(); a write-only factory (the PRIMARY use case) emits ZERO directives. Every test masked it via a trailing .read(). create JSDoc falsely promises run-end flush. Also confirmed/real: fake rename/move/copy over missing source -> empty content (C2); move trailing-slash -> double-slash path (B3); no executable test for REQ-PKG-01 /core-resolution (B4); envelope.force hard-coded false -> author cannot trigger, FAKE-04 Row3 only direct-fake-tested (B5); FIT-04 blind to handle method-signature changes (A1) + JSDoc-in-baseline false-positives (A2). Awaiting user go-ahead to fix + re-judge.
verify_final_note: verdict needs-fix (verify-failed, quality). Council (verify+architect+qa+security+tech-writer) converged. Blockers: (1) CI test-before-build -> FIT-04 ENOENT clean checkout + stale-dist false-green (qa reproduced a masked breaking change); (2) no files allowlist -> tarball ships src/test/dist-core+ContractFake; (3) FIT-07 5-file hardcode + no Record<> -> no-tree guard blind; (4) handle-chaining asserts .op not payload (mutation leak); (5) FIT-06 skips /conformance+re-exports, FoundHandle/WritableHandle lack @example; (6) currentContext error leaks defineFactory to authors; (7) setup-bun@v2 unpinned in id-token job; (8) FIT-03/05/CONF-01 red-proofs test stand-ins; (9) T-M2 in thrown messages. Routing fix pass -> re-verify. judgment-day deferred until verify passes.
